title: Home Office annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025
body: "The annual accounts provide a financial and narrative summary of the activities of the Home Office from 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  Accompanying the report are the core data tables.   We are aware that some of these publications may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing it so that we can fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "
